Drop-in UI Interfaces

The following interfaces are used with Xbox Drop-in UI.

Interface Description
ILiveEngine Provides access to the Xbox Drop-in UI engine, including methods to perform tasks such as enabling and starting features, retrieving notifications, and rendering the UI.
ILiveFriendsList Provides access to friends lists while the friends feature is not displayed.
ILivePlayersList Provides methods for adding and removing players in the list displayed by the players feature.
ITitlePlayersListItem Provides methods to obtain information from the title about players displayed in the players list.
